offer.title: SUV Summer Sale
offer.description: Get 15% off all SUVs this month. Limited time offer on our entire SUV inventory including Toyota RAV4, Honda CR-V, and more!

offer.title: First-Time Buyer Special
offer.description: New to car buying? Enjoy $2,000 off your first purchase at CarBreezy. Our team will guide you through every step.

offer.title: Luxury Sedan Event
offer.description: Premium sedans at unbeatable prices. 10% off all BMW, Mercedes-Benz, and Audi sedans in stock.

offer.title: Trade-In Bonus
offer.description: Trade in your old car and get an extra $1,500 towards your new purchase. Any make, any model accepted!

offer.title: Convertible Season
offer.description: Summer is here! Get 12% off all convertibles and feel the wind in your hair. Mustang, Camaro, and more!

offer.title: Pickup Truck Power Deal
offer.description: Heavy savings on heavy-duty trucks. $3,000 off all pickup trucks including F-150, Silverado, and Titan.

offer.title: Hatchback Hot Deal
offer.description: Compact and efficient! Save 8% on all hatchbacks. Perfect for city driving and parking.

offer.title: Zero Down Financing
offer.description: Drive away today with $0 down payment. Available on all certified used cars with approved credit.
